# Generated by apps/mods/stellaris/3x-bigger-worlds/scripts/build.py
# Multiplier: x3
# Transformations:
#   district_*_max_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   district_*_min_add        = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   planet_max_districts_add  = N  ->  N * 3   (N > 0 only)
#   produces = { res = N }    ->  res = N * 3  (positive numeric only)
# Untouched:
#   Negative values (blocker penalties stay at vanilla magnitude).
#   `@VAR` references (handled in scripted_variables/zz_bworlds_*).
#   `upkeep = { ... }` blocks (net deposit output therefore skews
#   3x-favorable on deposits with upkeep; see README).

d_shroudstone = {
	icon = d_shroudstone
	time = 270

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers_natural

	potential = {
		has_shroud_dlc = yes
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		planet_max_districts_add = -1
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			OR = {
				habitable_planet_not_urban = yes
				is_planet_class = pc_relic
			}
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		district_mining_max_add = 3
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			is_planet_class = pc_habitat
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		district_hab_mining_max_add = 3
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		planet_miners_sr_zro_produces_add = 0.05
	}

	can_be_cleared = { always = yes }

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers_natural
		cost = {
			unity = 500
		}
		produces = {
			sr_zro = 3
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 1

		modifier = {
			weight = 0
			has_monthly_income = {
				resource = sr_zro
				value <= 1
			}
		}
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_aura_blocker = {
	icon = d_aura_blocker
	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers_natural

	time = 360

	potential = {
		has_shroud_dlc = yes
	}
	can_be_cleared = {
		owner = { has_country_flag = fertility_accord }
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				NOR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		planet_max_districts_add = -1
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			OR = {
				habitable_planet_not_urban = yes
				is_planet_class = pc_relic
			}
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		district_farming_max_add = 3
	}

	triggered_planet_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = owner
			owner = {
				OR = {
					has_covenant_with_the_composer_of_strands = yes
					has_country_flag = forging_our_own_path
				}
			}
		}
		planet_farmers_sr_zro_produces_add = 0.05
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers_natural
		cost = {
			unity = 500
		}
		produces = {
			sr_zro = 3
		}
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_shroudfall = {
	icon = d_psionic_region
	time = 360

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers_natural

	potential = {
		has_shroud_dlc = yes
	}

	can_be_cleared = {
		always = yes
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_max_districts_add = -1
		planet_jobs_worker_produces_mult = -0.05
		planet_pops_upkeep_mult = 0.1
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers_natural
		cost = {
			unity = 1500
			energy = 1500
		}
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

d_shroudgate = {
	icon = d_psionic_region
	time = 360

	is_for_colonizable = yes
	category = deposit_cat_blockers_natural

	potential = {
		has_shroud_dlc = yes
	}

	can_be_cleared = {
		always = yes
	}

	planet_modifier = {
		planet_max_districts_add = -1
		planet_stability_add = -5
		planet_housing_mult = -0.1
	}

	resources = {
		category = deposit_blockers_natural
		cost = {
			sr_zro = 100
		}
	}

	drop_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}
